institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Family & Consumer Sciences — Consumer Sciences
programDescription: The Consumer Sciences concentration focuses on consumer behavior, market research, financial literacy, and consumer advocacy. Students learn to analyze market trends, evaluate product safety, and develop programs that protect and empower consumers. Graduates pursue careers in market research, consumer affairs, financial counseling, and government regulatory agencies.

certifications: Certified Financial Planner (CFP) — requires graduate work
careerOutlook.outlook: Market research analysts are among the fastest-growing occupations in the U.S. at 13% growth. Consumer protection and financial literacy expertise is increasingly valued as digital commerce expands and consumer data complexity grows.
